title: Day 17 Reflection
description: Solidify RTK Query patterns before authentication tomorrow.

prompts.question: How does RTK Query reduce boilerplate compared to Day 8 fetch + useEffect?
prompts.guidance: Compare loading state, caching, and refetch logic.

prompts.question: Did cache invalidation work on first try? What tag strategy did you use?
Where does product data live vs UI filter state in your architecture?
prompts.guidance: Separate server cache from client slice.

prompts.question: Explain promise chaining and how async/await relates to RTK Query internals.
prompts.guidance: Use your addProduct flow as example.

prompts.question: What would change when you add authentication on Day 18?
prompts.guidance: Preview auth headers without implementing today.
